name: 自动输入器（下一次升级微信刷屏器）不支持mac
xml:
try:
    import win32con
    import win32api
except:
    import pypiwin32
import time
input('输入法换到英文模式，回车开始，然后请在6秒后把光标移到一个输入框')
print('快速放好光标，否则看不到效果，你有6秒时间。输入框里的内容可别乱发')
time.sleep(6)
win32api.keybd_event(16, 0, 0, 0)
time.sleep(0.1)
win32api.keybd_event(73, 0, 0, 0)
time.sleep(0.37)
win32api.keybd_event(16, 0, win32con.KEYEVENTF_KEYUP, 0)
win32api.keybd_event(32, 0, 0, 0)
time.sleep(0.1)
win32api.keybd_event(76, 0, 0, 0)
time.sleep(0.1)
win32api.keybd_event(79, 0, 0, 0)
time.sleep(0.07)
win32api.keybd_event(86, 0, 0, 0)
time.sleep(0.1)
win32api.keybd_event(69, 0, 0, 0)
time.sleep(0.04)
win32api.keybd_event(32, 0, 0, 0)
time.sleep(0.05)
win32api.keybd_event(89, 0, 0, 0)
time.sleep(0.1)
win32api.keybd_event(79, 0, 0, 0)
time.sleep(0.11)
win32api.keybd_event(73, 0, 0, 0)
time.sleep(0.4)
win32api.keybd_event(8, 0, 0, 0)
time.sleep(0.1)
win32api.keybd_event(8, 0, win32con.KEYEVENTF_KEYUP, 0)
win32api.keybd_event(85, 0, 0, 0)
time.sleep(0.05)
win32api.keybd_event(32, 0, 0, 0)
win32api.keybd_event(70, 0, 0, 0)
time.sleep(0.01)
win32api.keybd_event(79, 0, 0, 0)
time.sleep(0.02)
win32api.keybd_event(82, 0, 0, 0)
win32api.keybd_event(32, 0, 0, 0)
time.sleep(0.08)
win32api.keybd_event(69, 0, 0, 0)
win32api.keybd_event(86, 0, 0, 0)
time.sleep(0.37)
win32api.keybd_event(69, 0, 0, 0)
time.sleep(0.11)
win32api.keybd_event(82, 0, 0, 0)
time.sleep(0.6)
print('你笑了吗？')
print('是的，我们能操控键盘打字，甚至有停留时间、故意退格，这就有感情了')
print('这句话是我故意写的，别无他意。为了这句话，我耗费了点时间转码和抽象理解，不信你看代码')
print('下一次给你们做一个操控tx会议、wechat、qq刷屏的工具！（被班主任打死别找我）')
